---
title: "Premier League 2024/25"
caption: "What the Data Reveals"
author: "Thomas Chula"
date: "`r Sys.Date()"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(DT)

# load and prepare data
epl_raw <- read.csv("https://www.football-data.co.uk/mmz4281/2425/E0.csv")

# Calculate league table
matches <- epl_raw %>%
  mutate(across('Date', ~dmy(.))) %>% 
  mutate(
    home_points = case_when(
      FTHG > FTAG ~ 3,
      FTHG == FTAG ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    away_points = case_when(
      FTAG > FTHG ~ 3,
      FTHG == FTAG ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )

home_stats <- matches %>%
  select(Team = HomeTeam, Points = home_points, Goals = FTHG, Goals_against = FTAG)

away_stats <- matches %>%
  select(Team = AwayTeam, Points = away_points, Goals = FTAG, Goals_against = FTHG)

league_table <- bind_rows(home_stats, away_stats) %>%
  group_by(Team) %>%
  summarise(
    Pld = n(),
    W = sum(Points == 3),
    D = sum(Points == 1),
    L = sum(Points == 0),
    GF = sum(Goals),
    GA = sum(Goals_against),
    GD = GF - GA,
    Pts = sum(Points)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Pts), desc(GD), desc(GF)) %>%
  mutate(Rank = row_number()) %>%
  select(Rank, everything())

```

## Executive Summary

```{r summary-stats}
# calculate key season stats
total_goals <- sum(league_table$GF)
avg_goals <- round(total_goals / nrow(matches), 1)
total_cards <- sum(epl_raw$HY, na.rm=TRUE) + sum(epl_raw$AY, na.rm = TRUE)

```
<!-- Based on `r nrow(matches)` matches played from `r format(min(epl_raw$Date), "%B %d, %Y")` to `r format(max(epl_raw$Date), "%B %d, %Y")` -->
